problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mycorrhizal. Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
